title: ajuga arabica
intro: Ajuga arabica, also known as Bugleweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antihormonal activities. The plant is said to provide various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, regulating thyroid function, and alleviating symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Ajuga arabica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as dried or frozen for later use in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
